title: sphaereupatorium scandens
intro: Sphaereupatorium scandens, also known as eastern boneset, is a perennial plant species belonging to the aster family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, eastern boneset contains medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant compounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and sore throats. Eastern boneset is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken internally, or applied topically for localized relief.
